description: Record and store mass data into tables. A table is a list of x,y pairs that can be plotted, exported and queried with FISH . See Table for more details about tables in MassFlow . In these tables, x is the period and y is the mass.

keywords.name: cumulative
keywords.description: If set to true , then the cumulative mass is recorded. The default is false , such that the mass for each period is recorded.

keywords.name: drawpoint
keywords.description: If this keyword is not given, the default is the sum of the mass for all drawpoints.

keywords.name: name
keywords.description: Specify a name for the table.

keywords.name: ore
keywords.description: Specify what mass quantity should be recorded. If not given, the default is all units. The value for s must correspond exactly to the name given to the ore in the mine block input file (see Block Model ).
